title: Portland Timbers Draw Against FC Dallas
description: The Portland Timbers returned to Providence Park to take on FC Dallas, resulting in a 2-2 draw.

sections.heading: Match Preview
paragraphs: The Portland Timbers were back at Providence Park to take on FC Dallas, according to Portland Timbers.

paragraphs: Felipe Mora scored in stoppage time to help the Timbers escape with a 2-2 draw against Dallas, as reported by kare11.com.
